headline: Is Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Reasonably Valued Or Too Rich?
summary: Monolithic Power Systems has delivered a very strong 240.7% return over the past five years, yet its current valuation checks lean expensive. This raises the question of how much of that success is already reflected in the US$1,272.81 share price. A 240.7% gain over five years signals that investors have been willing to pay up for Monolithic Power Systems' growth story, so expectations embedded in the stock are high. Recent headlines around both robust business performance and an...

headline: Does Monolithic Power Systems’ (MPWR) Index Shift Clarify Its Long-Term Competitive Positioning?
summary: In late June 2026, Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. was added to the Russell Top 200 Index and Russell Top 200 Growth Benchmark while being removed from the Russell Midcap Index and Russell Midcap Growth Benchmark as part of the latest index reconstitution. This shift moves Monolithic Power Systems into a larger-cap benchmark universe, which can alter how institutional investors gain exposure to the stock through index-linked products. We’ll now explore how Monolithic Power Systems’ move into...
